# Gaia Theme Specification

---

## Typography

**Font Family:** Inter

| Weight    | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Regular   | 400   |
| Medium    | 500   |
| Semibold  | 600   |
| Bold      | 700   |

### Type Scale

| Name        | Font Size        | Line Height        | Letter Spacing       |
|-------------|------------------|--------------------|----------------------|
| Display 3xl | 36px / 2.25rem / 2.5em | 56px / 3.5rem / 4em | -0.352px / -0.022em |
| Display xl  | 24px / 1.5rem / 1.7em  | 36px / 2.25rem / 2.5714em | -0.304px / -0.019em |

---

## Color Palette

### Primary Colors

| Token      | Name         | Hex       | HSL                       | RGB              |
|------------|--------------|-----------|---------------------------|------------------|
| Cyan 60    | Ocean Mist   | `#377EA0` | hsl(199.4, 48.8%, 42.2%)  | rgb(55, 126, 160) |
| Cyan 70    | Sea Depth    | `#2A6480` | hsl(199.5, 50.6%, 33.3%)  | rgb(42, 100, 128) |
| Cyan 80    | Marine Core  | `#1F4E66` | hsl(200.3, 53.4%, 26.1%)  | rgb(31, 78, 102)  |
| Cyan 90    | Ocean Abyss  | `#133445` | hsl(200.4, 56.8%, 17.3%)  | rgb(19, 52, 69)   |

### Secondary Colors

| Token     | Name        | Hex       | HSL                        | RGB               |
|-----------|-------------|-----------|----------------------------|-------------------|
| Orange 10 | Dawn Light  | `#FCF0E7` | hsl(25.7, 77.8%, 94.7%)    | rgb(252, 240, 231) |
| Orange 20 | Sunlit Sand | `#FAE0CE` | hsl(24.5, 81.5%, 89.4%)    | rgb(250, 224, 206) |
| Orange 30 | Amber Glow  | `#F5C3A1` | hsl(24.3, 80.8%, 79.6%)    | rgb(245, 195, 161) |

| Token      | Name            | Hex       | HSL                        | RGB               |
|------------|-----------------|-----------|----------------------------|-------------------|
| Neutral 10 | Cloud Veil       | `#F2F3F5` | hsl(220, 13%, 95.5%)       | rgb(242, 243, 245) |
| Neutral 20 | Stone Haze       | `#E2E4E9` | hsl(222.9, 13.7%, 90%)     | rgb(226, 228, 233) |
| Neutral 30 | Mountain Shadow  | `#CCCFD7` | hsl(223.6, 12.1%, 82.2%)   | rgb(204, 207, 215) |
| Neutral 60 | Storm Gray       | `#6F7687` | hsl(222.5, 9.8%, 48.2%)    | rgb(111, 118, 135) |

---

## Component Specifications

### Buttons

#### Primary Button (Filled)

| State    | Text      | Background |
|----------|-----------|------------|
| Enable   | `#FCF0E7` | `#1F4E66`  |
| Hover    | `#FCF0E7` | `#133445`  |
| Disabled | `#6F7687` | `#E2E4E9`  |

**Fonts:** Size: 14, Weight: Medium

#### Secondary Button (Outlined)

| State    | Text      | Background | Border    |
|----------|-----------|------------|-----------|
| Enable   | `#1F4E66` | `#FFFFFF`  | `#1F4E66` |
| Hover    | `#133445` | `#FAE0CE`  | (inherits)|
| Disabled | `#B9B9B9` | `#F2F3F5`  | `#CCCFD7` |

#### Menu / Dropdown Button

| State    | Text      | Background |
|----------|-----------|------------|
| Enable   | `#FCF0E7` | `#1F4E66`  |
| Hover    | `#FCF0E7` | `#133445`  |
| Disabled | `#6F7687` | `#E2E4E9`  |

**Fonts — Dropdown text:** Size: 14, Weight: Regular

---

### Input Fields

| State        | Label/Value | Border    | Background |
|--------------|-------------|-----------|------------|
| Enable       | `#133445`   | `#6F7687` | —          |
| Hover        | `#133445`   | `#377EA0` | `#FAE0CE`  |
| Focus/Active | `#133445`   | `#1F4E66` | `#FAE0CE`  |
| Error        | `#133445`   | `#CC453E` | `#FCF1EE`  |
| Warning      | `#133445`   | —         | —          |
| Success      | `#133445`   | —         | —          |
| Read Only    | `#133445`   | transparent | transparent |

**Read Only:** Value padding: 0

**Fonts:**
- Label: Size: 14, Weight: Medium
- Placeholder/Value: Size: 14, Weight: Regular

---

### Checkboxes

| State    | Text      | Background          | Border    |
|----------|-----------|---------------------|-----------|
| Enable   | `#FCF0E7` | `#1F4E66`           | —         |
| Hover    | `#FCF0E7` | `#1F4E66` / `#FAE0CE` | `#377EA0` |
| Disabled | `#6F7687` | `#E2E4E9`           | —         |

**Fonts:** Size: 14, Weight: Regular

---

### Radio Buttons

| State    | Text      | Background          | Border    |
|----------|-----------|---------------------|-----------|
| Enable   | `#FCF0E7` | `#1F4E66`           | —         |
| Hover    | `#FCF0E7` | `#1F4E66` / `#FAE0CE` | `#377EA0` |
| Disabled | `#6F7687` | `#E2E4E9`           | —         |

---

### Dropdown / Select

| State        | Label/Value | Border    | Background |
|--------------|-------------|-----------|------------|
| Enable       | `#133445`   | `#6F7687` | —          |
| Hover        | `#133445`   | `#377EA0` | `#FAE0CE`  |
| Focus/Active | `#133445`   | `#1F4E66` | `#FAE0CE`  |

---

### Tabs

| Element             | Value     |
|---------------------|-----------|
| Tab titles          | `#1F4E66` |
| Selected tab border | `#1F4E66` |
| Border              | `#6F7687` |

**Fonts:**
- Selected: Size: 14, Weight: Semibold
- Default: Size: 14, Weight: Regular

---

### Tags / Badges

| Variant         | Text      | Background | Border    |
|-----------------|-----------|------------|-----------|
| Approved        | `#133445` | `#EEF5EE`  | `#9BC59B` |
| Rejected        | `#133445` | `#FCF1EE`  | `#ECA79E` |
| Not distributed | `#133445` | `#FFFFFF`  | `#CBCFD8` |
| Distributed     | `#133445` | `#EDF4FE`  | `#93BBF9` |

**Fonts:** Size: 13, Weight: Medium

---

### Modal

| Element                   | Value     |
|---------------------------|-----------|
| Title and Description Text | `#133445` |
| Background                | `#FFFFFF`  |
| Border                    | `#1F4E66` |

**Fonts:**
- Title: Size: 20, Weight: Medium
- Description: Size: 14, Weight: Regular
